name: ASRock B650 PG Lightning ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x1 - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock B650 PG Lightning ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0
description: ASRock B650 PG Lightning ATX motherboard for AM5 socket with DDR5 support, dual PCIe 4.0 x16, and WiFi M.2 slot.
